title: Build a Soap-Box Car
body: Four wheels, a plank, a steering rope, two parents — the classic American gravity racer. Heir to the Soap Box Derby.

source.label: Popular Mechanics, 1936–38 (verify per issue); Boys' Life
source.ref: Popular Mechanics, 1936–38 (verify per issue); Boys' Life

bands: A plank of pine, ~4 feet × 1 foot × 1 inch
Four wheels (lawnmower wheels work; or repurpose old skateboard / wagon wheels)
Axles (¾-inch dowel rod, or threaded steel rod)
Eye bolts for the steering pivots
A length of rope for steering
author: engine
